plots.title: Certificate Dashboard - 42 Gates Grid
plots.description: Complete 42-certificate framework visualization showing 7 Primary Gates, 35 Technical Jury, and 3 Vaults (Ancestral, Torsion, Residue). Color-coded by status: GREEN=PASSED, RED=FAILED, GOLD=PRIMARY.

plots.title: Primary Gates Focus
plots.description: Focused view of the 7 Primary Gates that anchor the sterile certification framework.

plots.title: 4-Pattern Orthogonality
plots.description: Visualization of the 4-dimensional pattern orthogonality in G₂ manifold structure. Shows geometric independence of the four fundamental topological patterns.

plots.title: 4-Pattern Stability Heatmap
plots.description: Stability analysis of the 4-pattern configuration showing robustness under perturbations.

plots.title: Torsion Funnel: 288→24→125 Flow
plots.description: The geometric flow from 288 total roots through 24 G₂ dimensions down to 125 spectral residues. Visualizes the dimensional reduction cascade that generates physical constants.

validation.title: Validation & Certification
validation.description: Certificate dashboards and validation status visualizations

geometry.title: G₂ Geometry & Patterns
geometry.description: Geometric structure and pattern analysis of the G₂ manifold

topology.title: Topological Flow
topology.description: Dimensional reduction and topological cascade visualizations
